task_completion.description: Open the Jolly Lobby Track application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jolly Lobby Track application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate or register the visitor by entering their name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Margaret Chen' is visible in a search bar, registration form, or visitor list within the Jolly Lobby Track application.

task_completion.description: Enter or verify the visitor's company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The company name 'Nextera Consulting' is visible in the corresponding company field within the Jolly Lobby Track application.

task_completion.description: Generate or preview the visitor badge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A badge preview or print preview window is visible on screen, displaying the visitor's name (Margaret Chen) and company (Nextera Consulting).

task_completion.description: Save the badge as a PDF or PNG in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or file manager shows the file being saved as 'visitor_badge_output.pdf' or 'visitor_badge_preview.png' specifically in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jolly Lobby Track graphical interface rather than using terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The badge was generated using the application's built-in features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The badge preview or save action is initiated from within Jolly Lobby Track (e.g., clicking a 'Print', 'Preview', or 'Generate Badge' button), not created manually in an image editor or text editor.

integrity.description: The output file was not created using terminal shortcuts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using commands like 'touch' or 'echo' in the terminal to create a fake PDF or PNG file in the Documents folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Visitor Name: Margaret Chen. Visitor Company: Nextera Consulting. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/visitor_badge_output.pdf (minimum 1000 bytes) OR /home/ga/Documents/visitor_badge_preview.png (minimum 5000 bytes).
